title: Peter Keavey
compiled_truth: Peter Keavey is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-06-11), Peter Keavey sent 146 and received 211 emails, totalling 357 interactions. Top correspondents: [Annemoisan](people/annemoisan-hotmail) (20), [Dale Neuner](people/dale-neuner) (13), [David Forster](people/david-forster) (9), [John Arnold](people/john-arnold) (8), [Amoisan](people/amoisan-internationalsos) (6). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, sent, sent_items.
